prs.title: fix(cli): move @prisma/migrate to dependencies and modernize imports
prs.body:
- Move @prisma/migrate from devDependencies to dependencies as it's used at runtime
- Update JSON import syntax from 'assert' to 'with' (TC39 stage 3)
- Fix node:sqlite import with proper ts-expect-error comment
- Improve Version.test.ts regex to use template literal correctly
- Remove obsolete TODO comments

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Dependencies**
  * `@prisma/migrate` is now a runtime requirement for the CLI (previously development-only).

* **Chores**
  * Updated internal import handling and test snapshot validation.
  * Removed outdated TODO comments from CLI configuration.

prs.title: Implement CRUD operations for student management
Implement skill creation and retrieval endpoints
Implement search functionalities in searchController
prs.body: This file implements various search functionalities for candidates, applications, and jobs using Prisma. It includes methods for searching candidates based on criteria, fetching applications by job, bulk updating application statuses, comparing candidates, performing advanced searches, and executing full-text searches across multiple entities.

prs.title: Implement resume management controller
prs.body: This controller handles resume upload, parsing, retrieval, and deletion for students.

prs.title: Implement resource management controller
prs.body: This file implements the resource management functionality, including creating, retrieving, updating, deleting resources, and handling file uploads. It also provides recommendations based on user access history.

prs.title: Implement CRUD operations for resource categories
prs.body: This file implements CRUD operations for resource categories using Prisma. It includes functions to create, read, update, and delete resource categories with appropriate error handling.

prs.title: Add Codeforces service functions
prs.body: This file implements various functions to interact with the Codeforces API, including fetching user profiles, rating history, submissions, and problem tags.

prs.title: Implement CodeChef service for user data retrieval
prs.body: This service provides various functions to scrape and retrieve user profile data, rating history, contest statistics, recent submissions, and tier classification from CodeChef.

prs.title: Implement recruiter CRUD operations in recruiterController
Add notification preference controller
prs.body: This file implements notification preference management, including fetching, updating, and sending notifications for application status, interviews, and job recommendations.

prs.title: Implement notification controller with CRUD operations
Implement interview scheduling controller
prs.body: This file implements the interview scheduling controller, including functions for scheduling interviews, adding test links, creating assignments, submitting assignments, and evaluating assignments. It integrates with Prisma for database operations and external services for meeting creation.
